values.description: Backend base URL. Change to your Render URL for production: https://your-app.onrender.com
ACTIVE Clerk JWT token used for all requests. Swap this value when testing different roles. Get it from your browser console: await window.Clerk.session.getToken()
Clerk JWT for a user with ADMIN role. Copy this into clerk_token when testing admin-only endpoints.
Clerk JWT for a user with MENTOR role. Copy this into clerk_token when testing mentor endpoints.
Clerk JWT for a user with STUDENT role. Copy this into clerk_token when testing student endpoints.
DB id of a mentor. Update after calling Create Mentor Profile.
DB id of a student. Update after calling Register Student Profile.
DB id of a session. Update after calling Create Session.
DB id of a subject. Update after calling Create Subject.
